CustomField.description: Normalized litigation duration cost component for this project, populated by NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer from NEPA_Agency_Duration_Cost__mdt. Range: 0.00 (BOEM minimum, 6.5 months) to 1.00 (FTA maximum, 33.4 months). This is a COST proxy, not a win-probability signal — median duration is statistically identical for agency wins and challenger wins. Weighted at 15% in the v3 composite score formula. Stored separately to enable CRM Analytics dashboards that filter by cost exposure independently of win-probability.
CustomField.label: Litigation Duration Cost
